name: pixel-agents-web
description: Pixel Agents Web — browser-based pixel art office with AI agents

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:server
